addAnimalDescription: Here you can create a new animal to join your farm!

toast.createError: We couldn't create the animal. Please try again.
toast.bulkCreatePartialSuccess: {{createdCount}} animals were created and {{failedCount}} could not be created.
toast.bulkCreateError: We couldn't create the animals. Please try again.

errors.network: We couldn't connect to the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in again and try creating the animal.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to create animals in this farm.
errors.tagAlreadyExists: This tag number is already registered. Enter a different tag number.
errors.bulkTagsAlreadyExist: One or more tag numbers are already registered. Review the tags and try again.
errors.invalidBreed: The selected breed is not valid for this animal. Review the breed and try again.
errors.invalidSpecies: The selected species is not valid. Review the species and try again.
errors.singleValidation: Some animal information is invalid or incomplete. Review the required fields and try again.
errors.bulkValidation: Some bulk creation data is invalid or incomplete. Review the tags and sequence values and try again.
